# hetzner_server_order_products (Data Source)

Lists available Hetzner dedicated server order products.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `products` (Attributes List) List of server products. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--products))

<a id="nestedatt--products"></a>
### Nested Schema for `products`

Read-Only:

- `arch` (List of Number) Supported architectures.
- `description` (List of String) Product description lines.
- `dist` (List of String) Available distributions.
- `id` (String) Product ID.
- `lang` (List of String) Available languages.
- `location` (List of String) Available locations.
- `name` (String) Product name.
- `orderable_addons` (Attributes List) Available addons. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--products--orderable_addons))
- `prices` (Attributes List) Pricing information per location. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--products--prices))
- `traffic` (String) Included traffic.

<a id="nestedatt--products--orderable_addons"></a>
### Nested Schema for `products.orderable_addons`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Addon ID.
- `max` (Number) Maximum quantity.
- `min` (Number) Minimum quantity.
- `name` (String) Addon name.
- `prices` (Attributes List) Addon pricing per location. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--products--orderable_addons--prices))

<a id="nestedatt--products--orderable_addons--prices"></a>
### Nested Schema for `products.orderable_addons.prices`

Read-Only:

- `location` (String) Location code.
- `price_gross` (String) Gross price.
- `price_net` (String) Net price.
- `setup_price_gross` (String) Gross setup price.
- `setup_price_net` (String) Net setup price.



<a id="nestedatt--products--prices"></a>
### Nested Schema for `products.prices`

Read-Only:

- `location` (String) Location code.
- `price_gross` (String) Gross price.
- `price_net` (String) Net price.
- `setup_price_gross` (String) Gross setup price.
- `setup_price_net` (String) Net setup price.
